# Angular Calendar

> `@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar` is a themeable, signals-first calendar and resource
> scheduler for Angular 20/21/22. It renders your event data through month, week, day, timeline
> (resource scheduler), week-as-rows, agenda and year views. Timezone-correct, RFC 5545 RRULE
> recurrence, pointer + keyboard drag/resize/create, and OKLCH two-colour theming. Standalone,
> zoneless, OnPush and SSR-safe. MIT, free and open-source.

## Documentation

- [Playground](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/): interactive demo of every view + live theming.
- [Getting started](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/getting-started): install, quick start, versions, FAQ.
- [Views](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/views): month, week/day, timeline scheduler, week-as-rows, agenda, year.
- [Theming](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/theming): baseColor/accentColor/themeMode, status colours, `--cal-*` tokens, headless deriveTheme/applyTheme.
- [Interactions](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/interactions): drag/resize/create, keyboard operability, external drag-in, inline edit, validation.
- [Recurrence](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/recurrence): RRULE editor, expansion, this/this-and-following/all edit semantics, ICS.
- [Integration & API](https://angular-calendar.ascentspark.com/reference): component inputs/outputs, event model, headless engine, date adapter, accessibility, security.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ascentspark/angular-calendar) · [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar)

## Key facts

- Install: `npm i @ascentsparksoftware/angular-calendar date-fns date-fns-tz rrule`
- Versions: the package major tracks the Angular major — Angular 22 → `@latest` (22.x), Angular 21 → `@ng21` (21.x), Angular 20 → `@ng20` (20.x).
- Selectors: `cal-month-view`, `cal-time-grid` (week/day + `orientation="horizontal"` week-as-rows), `cal-timeline-view` (resource scheduler), `cal-agenda-view`, `cal-year-view`, `cal-recurrence-editor`, `cal-timezone-picker`.
- Shared inputs: `[events]` (required), `[viewDate]` (required), `[today]`, `[themeMode]`, `[baseColor]`, `[accentColor]`, `[statusColors]`, `[locale]`, `[timezone]`.
- Outputs: `(eventClicked)`, `(eventChanged)` (an EventChange the host applies to its own store), `(daySelected)`, `(viewPeriodChanged)`, `(externalDrop)`.
- Event model: `{ id, start, end?, allDay?, title?, status?, resourceIds?, recurrenceRule?, cssClass? }` with `start`/`end` as `{ epochMs, zone }` (IANA zone) or a `Date`.
- Timezone-correct via a pluggable date adapter (`date-fns` + `date-fns-tz` by default); wall-clock and DST correct.
- Headless engine: pure exported functions (`buildMonthView`, `buildTimeGridView`, `buildTimelineView`, `packColumns`, `expandRecurringEvents`, `deriveTheme`) with no DOM.
- License: MIT. Author: Ascentspark (https://ascentspark.com).
